Fallen human child. I can fight monsters in a bullet hell, or I can just flirt with a skeleton and date an awkward dinosaur. I am filled with determination.
Border inspector for the glorious nation of Arstotzka. I stamp passports, check for discrepancies in forged documents, and try to earn enough money to heat my apartment.
Stressed-out chef. Trying to chop onions, cook soup, and wash dishes on a pirate ship that is currently on fire and splitting in half. Usually yelling at my friends for burning the rice.
Trivia host and party entertainer. I force groups of friends to use their smartphones to draw terrible pictures, lie to each other, and compete in absurd quiz shows.
Board game enthusiast. Professional minigame competitor. Highly skilled at destroying my palms by rotating analog sticks rapidly and ruining lifelong friendships over a stolen Star.
Paranormal investigator. I walk into dark, abandoned houses with a thermometer, an EMF reader, and a spirit box, only to hide in a closet and cry when a ghost actually appears.
Detective trapped in a nightmarish mental world. Constantly running out of stamina after jogging for three seconds. Forced to burn defeated enemies with matches to make sure they stay dead.
Umbra Witch. I use pistols attached to my high heels to shoot angels, and I summon giant demons using my own hair as a conduit. Extremely stylish.
Jedi survivor. Traveling the galaxy with a cute little droid on my back. Specializes in deflecting blaster bolts, wearing various ponchos, and avoiding a very heavy-breathing Sith Lord.
Wandering hero on horseback. Tasked with hunting down sixteen massive, majestic stone beasts and climbing up their fur to stab their glowing weak points, all for a girl.
Protective older sister. Sneaking through 14th-century France while guiding my younger brother. I use a slingshot and fire to survive against the Inquisition and massive, terrifying swarms of rats.
Hospital administrator. Managing a wacky medical facility where patients suffer from 'Lightheadedness' (having a literal lightbulb for a head) or '8-Bitten'. Need more janitors.
Armchair tactician. I spend thousands of hours looking at spreadsheets, yelling at digital athletes for poor performance, and leading a 4th-division team to Champions League glory.
Virtual pilot. I spend hours pre-flighting a Cessna and flying in real-time across a perfectly modeled Earth, just to see if I can successfully land on the street in front of my real-world house.
Inheritor of a rundown farm. I work the fields from dawn to dusk, brush my cows, and try to give enough flowers to a local villager so they will marry me.
